OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Attach Files to a Referral

childElements.name: AttachAdditionalDocumentList
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContentDocumentId" : "=%UploadDocuments:AdditionalDocuments:UploadAnyAdditionalDocuments:data%", "ParentId" : "=%ReferralRecordId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSDRAttachFile", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataRaptorPostAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: AttachAdditionalDocuments
